title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
